sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47262" key="h(mi/seia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμίσεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμίσεον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμίσεος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἥμισος</orth>, <sense id="n47262.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἥμισυς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
